description: Style noteMinimalism at its sartorial best, this wallet from van heusen is an instant outfit updater. Fashioned in soft nubuck without the conservative stitch all around, this piece will Fit into your pocket effortlessly even as it elevates your fashion quotient.Product DetailsBeige nubuck upper with embossed brandingOne main compartment, four card slots and one coin holder pocketMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 9 cm x 11 cm
